meaning: adj.依靠氧气的,与需氧菌有关的,增氧健身法的
examples: Walking, done in the right way, is a form of aerobic exercise.
A number of fitness spas existed prior to this aerobic fitness movement, even a national chain with spas in most major cities.
Aerobic exercise gets the heart pumping and helps you to burn fat.
"I can't match those guys for aerobic power, I can't come close, " he said.
Aerobic exercise also burns calories, helps with endurance, heart health, lung capacity, and strength.
